items.title: Why we could see less of Kane for England at the 2026 World Cup...
items.summary: England have three strikers at this World Cup, and Harry Kane's replacements have never had such an important role.

items.title: Man City have opening Anderson bid rejected by Forest
items.summary: Manchester City have an opening transfer bid for midfielder Elliot Anderson rejected by Nottingham Forest.

items.title: Bobby Tambling dead aged 84: Chelsea legend and club’s 2nd all-time goalscorer dies after long illness
items.summary: CHELSEA's second top all-time goal scorer, Bobby Tambling, has died aged 84. He held the record as top goalscorer for the club for 47 years before it was beaten by Frank Lampard in 2013. The legendary player died after a long illness in Montenotte, Cork. items.summary: MANCHESTER CITY have had an opening bid for England star Elliot Anderson rejected by Nottingham Forest. items.title: I’m embarrassed by iconic England pic – I’m not brave, my son who tragically died after joining the Army is real hero
items.summary: TERRY BUTCHER’S iconic bloodied head photograph earned him a reputation as one of football’s most notorious hardmen. items.title: Riquelme: Madrid will sign Haaland if I win electi...
items.summary: Real Madrid's rival presidential candidates made their boldest moves yet on Wednesday, as Enrique Riquelme promised to sign Erling Haaland and Rodri if he's elected, and rival Florentino Perez confirmed José Mourinho as his chosen coach.

items.title: Moment North Korean women’s football team lose control as they bawl their eyes out when meeting Kim Jong-un
items.summary: THIS is the bizarre moment a North Korean women’s football team are reduced to tears as they meet Supreme Leader Kim Jong-un. items.title: Messi wins prestigious Princess of Asturias award
items.summary: Inter Miami CF and Argentina star Lionel Messi has been awarded the 2026 Princess of Asturias Award for Sports, becoming the first individual football player to be given the honor by the committee.

items.title: Rodman: U.S. Triple Espresso reunion 'amazing'
items.summary: The self-proclaimed "Triple Espresso" of United States women's national team forwards Trinity Rodman, Sophia Wilson and Mallory Swanson trained together this week for the first time since the 2024 Olympics.

items.title: Sources: Man United reach deal to sign Éderson
items.summary: Manchester United have agreed a deal with Atalanta for midfielder Éderson, sources have told ESPN.

items.title: Swiss appeal to U.S. embassy for Embolo WC visa
items.summary: Switzerland forward Breel Embolo applied for an urgent visa at the United States embassy in Bern on Wednesday, one day after he was denied boarding the team's flight to the World Cup because of a criminal conviction.

items.title: Dest 'surprised' by pro-U.S. crowd in USMNT win
items.summary: U.S. international Sergiño Dest said he was "pretty surprised" at the level of fan support the team received at Sunday's 3-2 friendly win over Senegal.

items.title: Aaronson gets married amid USMNT WCup camp
items.summary: Brenden Aaronson said he and his new wife, Milana D'Ambra, were "freaking out" when they discovered that their long-planned wedding would clash with the USMNT's World Cup training camp.

items.title: France's Deschamps eases Saliba back injury fears
items.summary: France head coach Didier Deschamps has eased fears surrounding the fitness of centre-back William Saliba ahead of the FIFA World Cup.
